v45_sources: user-provided colleague feedback file: CYBERSHIELD V45 PSYCHOLOGY-DRIVEN IMPROVEMENT REQUIREMENTS
v45_core_principle: CyberShield must not only measure trust. It must project trust.
v45_design_goal: Move CyberShield from a smart governance prototype to a calm executive control environment with consequence-first framing, accountable owners, proof-backed confidence, and ethical urgency.
v45_modules_not_yet_full_depth: full evidence-backed confidence across every score
v45_ethical_boundary: Use psychology to improve clarity, trust perception, and executive decision quality. Do not manipulate users, hide uncertainty, exaggerate capability, imply live enforcement where none exists, obscure the prototype boundary, create artificial fear, or pressure users without evidence.
current_capabilities: Dangerous Action Simulation as the central executive story
transparent weighted trust model across ten operational trust factors
Decision ladder: Allow, Constrain, Escalate, Block
manual evidence library with accumulating artifacts
role-tailored Proof Pack with report recipient personalization
Architecture path from Advisory Prototype to Guided Pilot to Enterprise Trust Platform

business_exposure_model.status: directional planning estimate, not guaranteed financial calculation
business_exposure_model.purpose: create an executive business exposure moment and tie weak trust to operational cost risk

strategic_direction.ownership: MJC-owned advisory software, not standalone SaaS yet
strategic_direction.tooling_preference: low-cost and inspectable third-party tools when useful
strategic_direction.visual_style: CyberShield True Blue trust environment, not pale SaaS and not black command center

crm_direction.sync_status: admin-only payload and CSV/export path only; no live browser sync

critical_ux_rule: Every visible executive object must either explain itself on hover/focus, drill into detail, or move the user forward. No dead bubbles.
critical_business_rule: Executive users need a business exposure moment. CyberShield should translate weak trust, evidence gaps, and unclear ownership into a directional business exposure range. Treat this as a planning estimate, not a guaranteed financial calculation.
critical_architecture_rule: CyberShield must remain consolidated and performant. Do not reintroduce old phase-file module sprawl, broad MutationObserver loops, dynamic script injection, or timestamp-based runtime loading.
prototype_boundary: The current public build is a lightweight static prototype with local/export-oriented behavior only. It is not connected to live SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, GRC, CRM, cloud telemetry, Google Sheets sync, or production agent enforcement systems.
commercial_entry_wedge: CyberShield Readiness Review or Operational Trust Assessment led by Maximum Justice Cybersecurity and Dr. Max Justice, vCISO, Security SME, Cybersecurity SME, U.S. veteran, and creator of The CHN vCISO GPT powered by Cyber Shield.
